school_address.streetAddress: KOTHARI INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL, B-279, B Block, Sector 50, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

reviews.author: Sharadha Subramani
reviews.review_body: My son studies in 1st Grade and I have seen how committed and enthusiastic the teachers are.The children enjoy coming to school and studying..Iam very grateful to Richa ma'am who takes care of the children so nicely.They recently had their annual day show A Tribute to Mahatma and it was a spectacular show with children narrating the story of Mahatma and his teachings so easily and accurately.They danced so confidently it was really an amazing sight to watch all the kids perform flawlessly and with such enthusiasm.

reviews.author: Akanksha Singh
reviews.review_body: It was amazing performance by kids and thanks to all teachers due to which we saw our kids performing so well.

reviews.author: P Kumar Iyer
reviews.review_body: The Grade 1 annual day performance was extraordinary. So much coordination, the dance numbers, the outfits were all fantastic! Brought out a range of emotions among the audience , parental love and patriotism in equal measure. Amazing efforts by the teachers and the little ones !

reviews.author: Neha Gupta
reviews.review_body: My kid in grade-1.... The annual day celebration is just wow passing each year....love the way teachers are nurturing the kids... The show we saw on stage is just way above our expectations.....the role chosen for kids is just perfect.... Which shows how much teachers are well aware with each n every kid....👏👏👏

reviews.author: pl aa
reviews.review_body:
My ward is in 1 F   - V .Nirwan
And grade tutor Pareena is working exceptionally good, making kids enjoy school . Kids showed tremendous improvement in academics as well as extra curricular activities.

Pankaj

reviews.author: Ankit Pathak
reviews.review_body:
We would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude to the school and the entire team for organizing such a remarkable "Tribute to Mahatma" show.
The event was a wonderful tribute, and we truly appreciate Parina Ma'am's dedication in guiding our daughter to perform confidently and deliver the narration with poise. Her support has greatly contributed to our child's growth.
We also want to thank all the didis, teachers, and staff who worked tirelessly behind the scenes to make the event a success.
Your collective efforts made this an unforgettable experience for the students and parents alike.

reviews.author: Manojita Shanker
reviews.review_body: It was heartwarming and memorable experience to attend "Tribute to Mahatma". The kids performances were fabulous and directly reflected the hardwork, effort and indulgence of teachers and all concerned staff of KIS. Every child was 100% stage ready and each one was equally superb. Heartfelt gratitude and congratulations to team KIS 🙏🙏🙏

reviews.author: NUPUR AGRAWAL
reviews.review_body: I was completely awestruck by the performance of each child.. Hats off to the hard work of teachers and mentors.. Best part was that sooo many kids got opportunity to not only perform but also speak on stage which is very very imp for their confidence building. It was a show to remember

reviews.author: Sulekha Faldu
reviews.review_body: Vande Bharat Assembly for grade 3 was a truly remarkable experience and showed exemplary efforts put in by teachers. All the students performed and were given equal opportunity to act and speak.

reviews.author: AJITA CHANDRA
reviews.review_body:
We have recently been a part of school’s SLC - “Marvellous Me” program. My daughter put up wonderful performance, teachers take extra efforts to bring out the best in every child. They have the best teaching team which focuses on the overall growth of children. Loads of hands on activities, teaching strategies and experiential learning for the students. Teachers provide experiential learning to their students, specially these little ones from kindergarten section.
Great team- Great school !!
